'''Peralli''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] associated with [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] around [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]]. He was killed by [[Finn Darktrin]] when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] attacked his ship while bringing [[Dusque Mistflier]] and Finn to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

{{Char-stub}}
